/usr/bin/c++ -g -Wl,--dependency-file=CMakeFiles/klinika.dir/link.d CMakeFiles/klinika.dir/main.cpp.o CMakeFiles/klinika.dir/Datum.cpp.o CMakeFiles/klinika.dir/Doktor.cpp.o CMakeFiles/klinika.dir/Klinika.cpp.o CMakeFiles/klinika.dir/Osoba.cpp.o CMakeFiles/klinika.dir/Pacijent.cpp.o CMakeFiles/klinika.dir/Racun.cpp.o CMakeFiles/klinika.dir/Recepcija.cpp.o CMakeFiles/klinika.dir/Sex.cpp.o CMakeFiles/klinika.dir/Status_termina.cpp.o CMakeFiles/klinika.dir/Termin.cpp.o CMakeFiles/klinika.dir/Usluga.cpp.o CMakeFiles/klinika.dir/Vremenska_oznaka.cpp.o -o klinika
